headline: Needham Raises its Price Target on NXP Semiconductors (NXPI) to $300
summary: NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NASDAQ:NXPI) is one of the 10 AI Stocks with Potential to Rise 1000 Percent. On April 29, 2026, Needham raised its price target on NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NASDAQ:NXPI) to $300 from $250 and maintained a Buy rating after the company reported a Q1 earnings beat and issued stronger-than-expected Q2 guidance. The firm […]

headline: NXP Semiconductors (NXPI) Is Up 22.8% After Strong Q1 Results And Upbeat Q2 Outlook
summary: NXP Semiconductors N.V. has already reported first-quarter 2026 results, posting sales of US$3,181 million and net income of US$1,122 million, alongside new guidance for second-quarter revenue of US$3,350 million to US$3,550 million and diluted EPS of US$2.60 to US$3.01. The company also completed a multi-year share repurchase program totaling 11,580,916 shares for US$2.55 billions, while highlighting AI and data center opportunities that could influence how investors view its long-term...

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on NXP Semiconductors, Raises Price Target to $340
summary: Barclays  analyst Tom O'Malley   maintains NXP Semiconductors (NASDAQ:NXPI) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $295 to $340.
